title: Loxtep agent node package (v1)
description: Schema for an agent node template. Defines an AI model invocation node that processes each event through a prompt template, validates output against an optional schema, and routes results to an output queue or error queue.

agent_node_id.description: Unique entity identifier for the agent node

workflow_id.description: Parent workflow this node belongs to

name.description: Human-readable name for the agent node

model_id.description: The model identifier to invoke (e.g. bedrock model ARN or alias)

prompt_template.description: Prompt template string rendered with event payload as context; supports {{key}} placeholders with dot notation

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for model response (1-300, default 30)

output_queue_name.description: Output queue name for successful invocations; set at deploy time

error_queue_name.description: Queue name for failed invocations (schema validation failures, timeouts)

output_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema to validate model output; events failing validation route to error queue

upstream_entity_id.description: Entity ID of the upstream node feeding events into this agent node

upstream_label.description: Label on the incoming edge from a branching upstream node

description.description: Optional description of the agent node's purpose

placeholders.description: Documentation for each {{PLACEHOLDER}} used in the entity block
